headline: Regions Institutional Services Named to NAPA Top Defined Contribution Advisor Teams List
summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala., June 04, 2026--Regions Bank on Thursday announced its Institutional Services division within Regions Wealth Management has been named to the National Association of Plan Advisors’ (NAPA) Top Defined Contribution Advisor Teams list. This esteemed recognition is awarded to firms providing retirement plan advisory services, fiduciary oversight and 401(k) solutions.
